nasb.text: Then the men feared the Lord greatly, and they offered a sacrifice to the Lord and made vows.

esv.text: Then the men feared the Lord exceedingly, and they offered a sacrifice to the Lord  and made vows.

cnv.text: 那些人就大大敬畏耶和華，向他獻祭和許願。

ccb.text: 众人都极其敬畏耶和华，向祂献祭，并且许愿。

csbs.text: 那些人大大敬畏耶和华，向耶和华献上祭物，并且许愿。
